song.title: Beautiful Things
song.author: Gungor
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V3 C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] All this pain I wonder if I'll ever find my way I wonder if my life could really change at all
[V2] All this earth Could all that is lost ever be found Could a garden come up from this ground at all
[C] You make beautiful things You make beautiful things out of the dust You make beautiful things You make beautiful things out of us
[V3] All around Hope is springing up from this old ground Out of chaos life is being found in You
[B] You make me new, You are making me new
